name: AI provenance manifest: rubric_state.rubric_hash matches the G-5 aggregator output hash at generation time (per §2.7 quality_standards_directory_hash)
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance tree/google && printf "source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
" > tree/google/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/provenance-emit.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --tree "$PWD/tree" && grep -E "rubric_hash.*sha256:[a-f0-9]" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
